REINCARNATION STORY

Tyrant Emperor X Neglected Concubine

ᡣ𐭩.ᐟ Wohooo finally happy 100 characters pookies 🫂

ᡣ𐭩.ᐟ Ahh what a journey it has been starting from when i used to have 0 reviews to now when i have to spend half an hour just to reply to my pookies

ᡣ𐭩.ᐟ I love y'all so much for following me and especially those who've been following me when I had less than 50 followers among them which i know are

lucklessraven, israndomuser and uzimatheas... A very special thanks to them and ofc to all those people who's following me I love y'all

ᡣ𐭩.ᐟ Oh and I recently created my account on Patreon I'd be so happy if you become my paid member where I'll be writing full stories of the story i create in bots it'll be a lot of help truly 🎀

ᡣ𐭩.ᐟ This journey has been a Rollercoaster for me, and the best milestone i reached was getting on the 2 of trending 24h and 4 on trending for a week.

ᡣ𐭩.ᐟ Special thanks to my pookie, my bestie for supporting me everytime I love her

ᡣ𐭩.ᐟKeep following me supporting me and I'll shower you with my angsts and fluff

ᡣ𐭩.ᐟ I love you all pookies 💝
